questions.clue: In 1791 this queen thought a disguise would work in fleeing Paris (it didn't. Also her husband's face was on the coins)
With big hopes, Ford put $250 mil. in development into this model that debuted in 1957 (the hopes & the model were gone by '59)
This PM said a 1938 pact with Germany brought "peace for our time" (it didn't. Czech. soon got annexed, & he lost his job)
In 1954 Senator McCarthy turned his anti-Red drive on this institution (but in confronting Joe Welch, he made a huge mistake)
On July 3, 1863 someone thought a "Charge" of this general's division would be a good idea (it wasn't. It really wasn't)
Every dog that has portrayed this female collie created by Eric Knight has actually been male
All Broadway productions of this musical have featured real-life shelter dogs as Sandy

This prophet gets no refund when he's thrown overboard while trying to flee to Tarshish by ship
In Numbers 7 this priestly tribe is given 6 covered wagons to transport the tabernacle & its furnishings
The prophet Elijah as a grand exit featuring this flaming vehicle

A portable rocket launcher, or a brand of bubble gum

When Sao Tome & this neighbor 90 miles to the N.E. were discovered by the Portuguese in the 1470s, they were uninhabited
